# azurefoundry Provider

Manages resources in [Azure AI Foundry](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-foundry/) — agents, files, vector stores, and memory stores.

## Authentication

The provider tries authentication methods in this order:

1. **API key** — `api_key` attribute or `AZURE_AI_FOUNDRY_API_KEY`
2. **OIDC client assertion** — `tenant_id` + `client_id` + `oidc_token` (or `AZURE_OIDC_TOKEN` / `ARM_OIDC_TOKEN`). Used by Pulumi ESC and federated GitHub Actions OIDC.
3. **Service principal with secret** — `tenant_id` + `client_id` + `client_secret`
4. **Azure CLI** — set `use_azure_cli = true` after `az login`
5. **Default Azure credential chain** — managed identity, workload identity, etc.

All credentials are marked `Sensitive` so they're redacted from `terraform plan` output.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    azurefoundry = {
      source = "dirien/azurefoundry"
    }
  }
}

# Azure CLI auth is the simplest local-development setup. Pick one of the
# four supported auth methods — see the provider page for the full list.
provider "azurefoundry" {
  project_endpoint = "https://<resource>.services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/<project>"
  use_azure_cli    = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) An API key for the Foundry project. Can also be set via `AZURE_AI_FOUNDRY_API_KEY`.
- `client_id` (String) Service principal client ID. Reads `AZURE_CLIENT_ID` or `ARM_CLIENT_ID`.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) Service principal client secret. Reads `AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET`.
- `oidc_token` (String, Sensitive) OIDC client assertion / federated token. Used together with `tenant_id` and `client_id` to authenticate via `ClientAssertionCredential`. Reads `AZURE_OIDC_TOKEN` or `ARM_OIDC_TOKEN` (the latter for Pulumi ESC).
- `project_endpoint` (String) The Azure AI Foundry project endpoint. Can also be set via `AZURE_AI_FOUNDRY_PROJECT_ENDPOINT`.
- `tenant_id` (String) Azure AD tenant ID. Reads `AZURE_TENANT_ID` or `ARM_TENANT_ID`.
- `use_azure_cli` (Boolean) Use credentials from `az login`. Defaults to `false`.
